Nubs Nob (Harbor Springs).conditions: Excellent base depth and grooming.  The snow was already pretty sticky by 11:00am with the warm temps and sun.  Possible snow later this week means there is still a chance of nice ski conditions right up until closing day on April 5th.  If you can hit the freeze-thaw just right it’s awesome out there.

nubsNob.xcTrails: Trails were groomed on Saturday. We plan to groom again on Wednesday.
nubsNob.comments: Spring skiing has arrived at Nub's Nob. The primary surface is machine groomed. The snow has a lot of moisture in it from some rain last night. Expect variable conditions today with some areas close to setting up and other areas of soft snow. Rain is possible later today. Redneck Chili is back by popular demand on the soup line. The Pintail Peak Lodge is open with an espresso bar. The lifts are spinning daily from 9:00 a.m. to 4:30 p.m. thru April 5. Make it a great day at Nub's Nob.
